issues.title: Cross-feature import: cart imports from products
issues.description: CartDrawer.tsx imports `PRODUCT_CATEGORIES` from `@/features/products/domain/constants`. This violates feature isolation — the cart feature must NOT import directly from the products feature. Cross-feature data should be shared via the shared layer or passed as props.
issues.rule: Features MUST NOT import directly from other features
issues.fix: Move PRODUCT_CATEGORIES (or the category-to-color mapping) to `@/shared/domain/constants.ts` since both cart and products need it, or pass the color as a prop from the parent that already has access to product data.

issues.title: Cross-feature import: products imports from cart
issues.description: ProductCard.tsx imports `useCart` and `useFlyToCartContext` from `@/features/cart`. This violates feature isolation — presentation components in the products feature depend directly on the cart feature's application layer.
issues.rule: Features MUST NOT import directly from other features
issues.fix: Invert the dependency: pass `onAddToCart` callback and `quantityInCart` as props from a parent that composes both features. The ProductCard should be a pure presentational component that doesn't know about the cart.

issues.title: Cross-feature import: ProductDetailPage imports from cart
issues.description: ProductDetailPage.tsx imports `CartDrawer` and `useCart` from `@/features/cart`. The products feature page directly depends on the cart feature for rendering and state.
issues.rule: Features MUST NOT import directly from other features
issues.fix: CartDrawer is already rendered in the locale layout. Remove the duplicate CartDrawer from ProductDetailPage. For useCart, pass addItem/cartItems as props from a composition layer, or use a shared context/store.

issues.title: Cross-feature import: HeroSection imports from cart
issues.description: HeroSection.tsx imports `useCart` and `useFlyToCartContext` from `@/features/cart`. Another instance of the products feature's presentation layer directly depending on the cart feature.
issues.rule: Features MUST NOT import directly from other features
issues.fix: Pass `onAddToCart` handler and `quantityInCart` as props from the ProductDetailPage, which should orchestrate both features.

issues.title: Relative imports crossing presentation layers
issues.description: ProductCatalogPage.tsx uses relative imports like `../components/CategoryFilter`, `../components/ProductGrid`, `../components/SearchBar`, `../components/TypeFilter`. While these stay within the same feature and layer (presentation), the convention requires absolute imports for cross-directory references within features.
issues.rule: Cross-layer in features MUST use absolute imports

issues.title: Search params defined in presentation layer instead of domain
issues.description: The `searchParams` object using nuqs parsers is defined inline in ProductCatalogPage.tsx (presentation layer). Per URL state management rules, parsers should be defined in the domain layer at `features/products/domain/searchParams.ts`.
issues.rule: URL search param parsers belong in domain/searchParams.ts
issues.fix: Extract `searchParams` to `@/features/products/domain/searchParams.ts` and import it from there.

issues.title: Not-found page contains UI logic instead of being a thin wrapper
issues.description: The not-found.tsx route file contains full component UI, translations, and styling. Per App Router rules, route files should be thin wrappers that import and render feature pages. However, Next.js not-found.tsx files are a special case — they cannot easily delegate to feature pages since they are framework-specific. This is a minor concern.
issues.rule: Route files (page.tsx) MUST only import and render feature pages
issues.fix: Consider extracting the not-found UI to `@/features/products/presentation/pages/ProductNotFoundPage.tsx` and importing it from the route file, or accept this as an acceptable exception for Next.js not-found pages.

issues.title: Hardcoded English labels in domain constants
issues.description: PRODUCT_TYPES and PRODUCT_CATEGORIES contain hardcoded English labels like `"Physical"`, `"Digital"`, `"Fursuits"`, `"Merch"`, etc. Domain constants should contain values/keys only; display labels should come from i18n translations. Note: The ProductCard and other components already use `useTranslations` for category/type labels, so these hardcoded labels in constants appear to be dead code or used elsewhere without i18n.
issues.rule: No hardcoded user-facing strings — use i18n
issues.fix: Remove the `label` field from PRODUCT_TYPES and PRODUCT_CATEGORIES, or replace with translation keys. Components already use `tCategories(product.category)` and `tTypes(product.type)` for display.

issues.title: Direct mock data import in presentation page
issues.description: ProductDetailPage.tsx imports `mockProducts` from `@/mocks/data/products` and uses it to find a product by ID. This couples the page directly to mock data. In a real application, this should come from an API/infrastructure layer.
issues.rule: Data fetching belongs in infrastructure layer, not presentation
issues.fix: Create a `useProduct(id)` hook in the application layer that currently wraps the mock data, making it easy to swap for real API calls later.

issues.title: Direct mock data import in presentation page
issues.description: ProductCatalogPage.tsx imports `mockProducts` from `@/mocks/data/products`. Same issue as ARCH-009 — mock data is consumed directly in the presentation layer instead of being abstracted through an application/infrastructure layer.
issues.rule: Data fetching belongs in infrastructure layer, not presentation
issues.fix: Create a `useProducts()` hook in the application layer that wraps the mock data source.

issues.title: Layout file properly orchestrates cross-feature concerns
issues.description: The locale layout correctly imports from multiple features (auth, cart) and shared packages. This is the proper composition point for cross-feature integration, following Clean Architecture. The layout acts as a thin orchestrator.
issues.rule: Layout files MAY contain providers and shell components from /shared
issues.fix: No fix needed — this is correct.

issues.title: Feature barrel exports properly defined
issues.description: Both products and cart features have proper `index.ts` barrel exports exposing their public API. This follows the feature isolation pattern correctly.
issues.rule: Each feature MUST have an index.ts exporting its public API
issues.fix: No fix needed — this is correct.

issues.title: Route pages are proper thin wrappers
issues.description: Both `[locale]/page.tsx` and `products/[id]/[slug]/page.tsx` correctly import feature pages and render them as thin wrappers. Only locale setup (setRequestLocale) and param extraction happen in route files.
issues.rule: Route files MUST only import and render feature pages
issues.fix: No fix needed — this is correct.
